design_concept: The Terminal Architect: A neo-brutalist, high-contrast, developer-first aesthetic. Rejects the soft, glowing 'magic AI' trope. Embraces raw structure, visible borders, and industrial precision.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Never center align. Use uppercase for overlines.

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI labels, chat interface, and code editor.

grids.app: Split-screen control room, tight gap-0, separated by 2px black borders

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3311] text-white border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest font-bold

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-none p-4 font-mono text-black focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#FF3311] focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#FF3311] transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-none p-8 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]

chat_interface.user_message: bg-white border-2 border-black p-4 ml-8 rounded-none shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]
chat_interface.ai_message: bg-[#F4F4F0] border-2 border-black border-l-8 border-l-[#FF3311] p-4 mr-8 rounded-none

code_editor.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#E0E0E0] p-6 font-mono border-2 border-black overflow-y-auto h-full

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard offset shadow increases, slight -translate-y-0.5, strict and mechanical transitions (ease-out 0.15s).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Instant or very fast structural reveals. No soft cross-fades.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: translate-y-1 shadow-[0px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] (pressed down physical button effect).

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react for UI, react-icons/si (SimpleIcons) for tech stack/sponsor logos (SiReact, SiTailwindcss, SiVercel, SiGithub).

hero_abstract_wireframe.description: Architectural wireframe for hero section background or graphic element.

feature_ide_concept.description: Minimalist terminal concept for 'How it works' or features bento grid.

pattern_texture.description: Subtle paper grain/blueprint texture to overlay on the light background (`mix-blend-multiply` with low opacity).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Use JetBrains Mono for all body text, buttons, and editor elements.
Implement a strict Neo-Brutalist design: 2px black borders on ALL containers, cards, and inputs. No rounded corners (rounded-none).
Use hard offset shadows (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #0A0A0A) for interactive elements instead of soft blurs.

For the App/IDE view, create a split-screen layout using CSS Grid or Flexbox with a heavy resizable-looking black divider. Left pane is the AI Chat (light theme), right pane is the Code/Preview (dark theme, #0A0A0A).
Do NOT use placeholder text for logos. Use react-icons/si (SimpleIcons) like SiReact, SiVercel, SiGithub for the sponsor/stack section.
Overlay 'pattern_texture' image on the main background with opacity-20 and mix-blend-multiply to break the digital flatness.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away their default border-radius, soft shadows, and default fonts. Override them to be sharp, bordered, and mono-spaced where applicable.
